title: 24" Full Length Rubber Gloves, Medium Weight, Industrial Protective Lab Supplies
description:
Protect your hands and arms with these full length protective rubber gloves with texturized palms for safe handling of materials. These rubber gloves are an essential lab supply industrial accessory while being ideal even serious gold panners. Each pair is 24" in length, so they 'll fit most all and cover your arms to protect you. They feature a texturized palm grip and are black in color. They are made large enough that you can wear thermal gloves underneath, can be used in outdoor environments, in wet and cold conditions. Make sure you have a pair of these to protect your hands and arms from the elements you work with.

  • ARM LENGTH RUBBER GLOVES: Texturized palm grip; Length: 24 inches;

  • Ideal for gold prospecting and cold water gloves; fully waterproof against the elements, good cold water protection works well with seafood handling, oyster gloves
